subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Kimiya 4
subcodes.first_line: Thy letter written in the Arabic tongue is present before Our Throne and the reply hath been revealed in the Persian language
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت بلسان عربی لدی العرش حاضر و بلسان پارسی جواب آن نازل بسمع طاهر مقدس اصغا
subcodes.subjects: @alchemy; the elixir, @four elements, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @law of cause and effect
